heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3074 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary and appropriate to carry out the provisions and purposes of this chapter (other than the provisions and purposes of sections 3023, 3025, 3035, 3038 of this title and subchapters III, IV, and V).
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the National Security Act of 1947, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 495

CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section, and to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 411 of this titlesection 171m of Title 5Pub.
